positive: Stylized, central composition illustration of an ancient bioluminescent forest scene at twilight. The main elements include towering, delicate flora with intricate, vein-like glowing patterns (neony green and deep sapphire blue accents) and a central, gentle, ethereal fox silhouette howling towards a crescent moon. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau flow and detailed scientific illustration, utilizing clean vector lines and extreme contrast. Focus on strong, graphic silhouettes and negative space to ensure excellent print readability on fabric. The lighting must emanate purely from the bioluminescent flora, casting deep, saturated shadows and defined glowing contours. Limited color palette: deep indigo, teal, emerald green, and glowing white/light cyan. Full view, highly detailed, symmetrical composition, concept art for apparel print.
negative: low quality, worst quality, bad anatomy, distorted, cropped, text, watermark, signature, jpeg artifacts, excessive blur, messy, busy background, logos, writing, out of frame, extra limbs
